hyperedges.label: STL Algorithm Workflow: Containers + Iterators + Lambdas + Algorithms
Error Handling Toolset: Exceptions, optional, variant for different error kinds
Data Race Mitigation Strategies (mutex, atomic, work division)
Backprop chain: chain rule + forward + backward + autograd
Transformer block composes attention + MLP + LayerNorm + residual
